message:
Fix protocol regeneration and comma parsing in Exclusion Test

Bug fixes from fresh-eyes code review:

1. Protocol regeneration now handles newly selected tests
   - If user goes back to select more tests, new protocols are generated
   - Preserves existing protocol data for tests that already have them
   - Fixes silent failure when adding tests after initial protocol generation

2. Comma-separated inputs now properly handle both "a, b" and "a,b"
   - dataSources and limitations inputs split on "," and trim each item
   - Previously only worked with ", " (comma-space)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
